extortion.description: At Schlesinger Law Offices, P.A., our Fort Lauderdale personal injury attorneys understand just how difficult dealing with a serious injury can be. With more than 70 years of collective experience, our firm has the experience you need to navigate any legal hurdle that comes your way, and we will help you fight to secure the compensation you need to cover any medical bills or damages you incurred.SITE: www.schlesingerlaw.com Address : 1212 Southeast Third Avenue Fort Lauderdale, FL 33316 USAALL DATA SIZE: ~2.2tb+ 1.
